potential_hallucinations.requirement: The system shall have a superstate that encapsulates multiple states.
The system shall expand the Operation state to show more detail.
The system shall run the microwave generator for a specified time during cooking.
The system shall sound a buzzer on completion of cooking.
The system shall move to the disabled state if the door is opened during operation.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: The system shall be able to recover from a power failure.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall be able to recover from a power failure.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: The system shall provide an alarm when the door is opened during operation.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall provide an alarm when the door is opened during operation.

hallucinations.rewritten_requirement: The system shall expand the Operation state to show more detail.
hallucinations.reason: There is no mention of expanding states in the source text. This requirement seems to be an assumption or a misunderstanding.

hallucinations.rewritten_requirement: The system shall move to the disabled state if the door is opened during operation.
hallucinations.reason: While the source text mentions that the system moves to the disabled state, it does not explicitly state that this happens when the door is opened. This requirement seems to be an interpretation.

duplicates.requirement_a: The system shall perform a status check at the start of operation.
duplicates.requirement_b: The system shall indicate an alarm and disable operation if problems are discovered during operation.
duplicates.reason: These two requirements seem to be related and could potentially be combined into one requirement.

ambiguities.rewritten_requirement: The system shall run the microwave generator for a specified time during cooking.
ambiguities.reason: It is not clear what 'during cooking' means. Does it mean that the microwave generator should be running continuously while cooking, or only at certain points? This requirement seems ambiguous.
